step.title: Load architecture and detect framework
step.action: Read architecture document and detect mobile framework (Flutter, React Native, native).
Identify platform targets (iOS, Android, or both) and minimum OS versions.

step.title: Define device testing matrix
step.action: Define device testing matrix: OS versions, screen sizes, capabilities.
Include both physical devices and simulators/emulators in the matrix.

step.title: Design platform-specific test plans
step.action: Design platform-specific test plans for iOS (HIG compliance) and Android (Material 3).
Cover platform-specific behaviors: permissions, deep linking, app lifecycle.

step.title: Plan gesture and interaction testing
step.action: Plan gesture and interaction testing coverage: tap, swipe, pinch, long-press, drag.
Include accessibility gesture support and screen reader compatibility.

step.title: Plan push notification and background testing
step.action: Plan push notification testing across foreground, background, and terminated states.
Plan offline mode and background state transition testing.

step.title: Produce mobile test plan
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with mobile test details.
